items.claim: Kamaru Usman is 39 years old and his age is a significant disadvantage against Dricus Du Plessis.
items.quote: But guys, a 40- or near-40-year-old Usman, who's 39, does not stand a chance against Dricus Du Plessis.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis is physically stronger than Kamaru Usman.
items.quote: Dricus is just so much stronger than Kamaru.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman will be unable to take Dricus Du Plessis down.
items.quote: I don't think he's going to be able to take Dricus down.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis possesses unique striking angles that will allow him to hit Kamaru Usman effectively.
items.quote: A guy that just finds unique angles. He's going to touch you up.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman's knees are severely damaged, impacting his mobility.
items.quote: We know your knees are fried. We know you can't go upstairs anymore.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman lacks the punching power to be effective at 185 pounds.
items.quote: Usman's not He does not hit hard enough for 85.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is not fast enough to compete with Dricus Du Plessis.
items.quote: And he's not fast enough for Dricus.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis will successfully defend all of Kamaru Usman's clinch and wrestling attempts.
items.quote: I think Dricus is going to fight off every single clinch attempt or wrestling attempt that Usman throws at him.
